params.name: The Tale of Genji
params.source: CIV Master Scroll (37.5%), Fragment Crafting (18.8%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scroll (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.69%), Yamato Treasure Map (5%)
params.description:
On Nov 9, AD 1008, Murasaku wrote the world's earliest realism novel.

"The Tale of Genji" is a million-character Japanese novel. This book tells the story of three generations of people which spans more than 70 years and has more than 400 characters. It mainly focuses on the story of Genji and his son Kaoru on their lives and relationship with other women. It reflects the power struggle and corrupted life among the nobles of the time. In that chaotic society, marriages were often used as a chip …
